# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Setup Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: '18'
        cache: 'npm'

    - name: Cache npm dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      id: cache-npm
      with:
        path: |
          **/node_modules
          ~/.npm
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-

    - name: Install npm dependencies
      if: steps.cache-npm.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
      run: npm ci

    - name: Cache pip dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      id: cache-pip
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.cache/pip
          .venv
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

    - name: Setup Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v4
      with:
        python-version: '3.9'
        cache: 'pip'

    - name: Install pip dependencies
      if: steps.cache-pip.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
      run: |
        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
        pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Cache build outputs
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      id: cache-build
      with:
        path: |
          build/
          dist/
          .next/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.sha }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-build-

    - name: Run build
      run: |
        npm run build

    - name: Cache environment configs
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      id: cache-configs
      with:
        path: |
          .env.local
          config/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ github.ref }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-config-

    - name: Run tests
      run: npm test
